list.name: Changes
list.comment:
refactor: convert to mouse-aim shooting system and improve projectile physics
- Change player shooting from keyboard to mouse click detection (left mouse button) - Implement mouse-aim projectile system with vector-based trajectory calculation - Increase Player1Shot speed from 1 to 5 for faster bullets - Reduce Enemy1Shot damage from 20 to 5 for better game balance - Restore enemy shot delays to 100ms for more predictable combat - Change player jump key from SPACE to W key - Simplify player movement to A/D keys only (removing right-side bindings) - Fix enemy spawn positioning: Enemy1 spawns at random vertical position (10 to half screen) - Improve off-screen cleanup for all projectiles (top, bottom, left, right boundaries) - Remove player keyboard shooting bindings (RCTRL/LCTRL)

MESSAGE.value:
feat: implement complete Alien Invasion game with menus, levels, and score tracking
- Add main game loop and window management - Implement player movement and shooting mechanics - Add enemy spawning and AI shooting behavior - Create scrolling background system for two levels - Add collision detection and entity health management - Implement game modes: 1P, 2P cooperative, and 2P competitive - Add menu system with music and visual assets - Implement score tracking with SQLite database storage - Add background music and sound effects - Include all game assets (sprites, backgrounds, audio files) - Add IDE configuration files for PyCharm

fix: add gravity and jump mechanics for platform-style movement
- Add GRAVITY_VALUE constant for vertical acceleration - Implement vertical velocity and ground state tracking in Player class - Replace UP/DOWN movement with jump mechanic using SPACE key - Apply gravity when player is not on ground - Set initial jump velocity to -17 for upward motion - Reset vertical velocity and ground state when landing - Remove deprecated UP and DOWN key movement bindings

feat: implement enemy AI tracking and platform collision for sidescroller
- Add enemy AI that tracks player's horizontal position (moves toward player) - Modify Enemy.move() to accept player position parameter and follow player - Remove random vertical spawn, position enemies at ground level (bottom of screen) - Set enemy spawn at WIN_HEIGHT ground level for platform-based gameplay - Remove deprecated PLAYER_KEY_UP and PLAYER_KEY_DOWN constants - Update Level class to pass player position to enemy movement - Improve entity iteration order for proper collision detection

feat: add death screen and reduce player health for increased difficulty
- Add DeathScreen class displayed when player dies during gameplay - Implement death screen with "YOU DIED" message and ESC to return to menu - Load ScoreBg.png as death screen background with menu music - Reduce Player1 health from 300 to 20 for more challenging gameplay - Integrate death screen flow in Game loop when level returns False - Allow returning to main menu via ESC or ENTER key from death screen

refactor: improve game balance and implement homing enemy projectiles
- Adjust player health from 20 to 50 for better survivability - Increase enemy health (Enemy1: 50→100, Enemy2: 60→150) for higher difficulty - Reduce enemy shot delay significantly (Enemy1: 100→20, Enemy2: 200→15) for aggressive AI - Reduce player shot delay from 20 to 10 for faster firing rate - Implement homing projectile system for enemy shots targeting player position - Add vector-based movement calculation using hypotenuse for accurate trajectory - Fix Player1 spawn positioning to ground level (bottom of screen) - Modify Enemy.shoot() to accept player position parameter for homing shots - Update Level class to pass player position to enemy shooting mechanism

refactor: convert to mouse-aim shooting system and improve projectile physics
- Change player shooting from keyboard to mouse click detection (left mouse button) - Implement mouse-aim projectile system with vector-based trajectory calculation - Increase Player1Shot speed from 1 to 5 for faster bullets - Reduce Enemy1Shot damage from 20 to 5 for better game balance - Restore enemy shot delays to 100ms for more predictable combat - Change player jump key from SPACE to W key - Simplify player movement to A/D keys only (removing right-side bindings) - Fix enemy spawn positioning: Enemy1 spawns at random vertical position (10 to half screen) - Improve off-screen cleanup for all projectiles (top, bottom, left, right boundaries) - Remove player keyboard shooting bindings (RCTRL/LCTRL)

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
refactor: convert to mouse-aim shooting system and improve projectile physics
- Change player shooting from keyboard to mouse click detection (left mouse button) - Implement mouse-aim projectile system with vector-based trajectory calculation - Increase Player1Shot speed from 1 to 5 for faster bullets - Reduce Enemy1Shot damage from 20 to 5 for better game balance - Restore enemy shot delays to 100ms for more predictable combat - Change player jump key from SPACE to W key - Simplify player movement to A/D keys only (removing right-side bindings) - Fix enemy spawn positioning: Enemy1 spawns at random vertical position (10 to half screen) - Improve off-screen cleanup for all projectiles (top, bottom, left, right boundaries) - Remove player keyboard shooting bindings (RCTRL/LCTRL)
